mapper.select: SELECT tb1.word_no, tb1.level, tb2.category_name, tb1.kor_word, tb1.kor_romanization, tb1.kor_audio_url, tb1.kk_word, tb1.kk_romanization, tb1.kk_audio_url FROM tb_words tb1 LEFT JOIN tb_category tb2 ON tb2.category_no = tb1.category_no;
SELECT t1.user_id, t1.native_lang, t1.target_lang, t1.daily_word_limit FROM tb_user_settings t1 WHERE t1.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT t1.mastery_level, t1.consecutive_hits, t1.next_review_at FROM tb_user_word_progress t1 WHERE t1.user_id = #{userId} AND t1.word_no = #{wordNo}
SELECT t1.daily_word_limit ,t1.native_lang ,t1.target_lang FROM tb_user_settings t1 WHERE t1.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT t1.word_no ,t1.created_at ,t1.last_reviewed_at FROM tb_user_word_progress t1 where t1.user_id = #{userId} order by t1.created_at desc limit #{dailyWordLimit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_user_word_progress ( user_id, word_no, mastery_level, consecutive_hits, next_review_at, last_reviewed_at, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{wordNo}, #{masteryLevel}, #{consecutiveHits}, #{nextReviewAt}, NOW(), NOW() ) ON CONFLICT (user_id, word_no) DO UPDATE SET mastery_level = EXCLUDED.mastery_level, consecutive_hits = EXCLUDED.consecutive_hits, next_review_at = EXCLUDED.next_review_at, last_reviewed_at = NOW();
